name: super-pmo-agent
description: Config-backed Turnbull Court residential duplex PMO super-agent for project management, cost control, workbook automation, procurement, Victorian regulatory guidance, reporting, and safety gap review.

interface.shortDescription: Config-backed PMO super-agent for 9 Turnbull Court duplex work.
interface.longDescription: Project-specific, config-backed agent instructions for the 9 Turnbull Court, Brunswick West VIC 3055 residential duplex, covering Victorian planning/building pathways, HIA contract administration, cost/workbook control, procurement, programme, reporting, inspections, defects, safety gap review, and escalation boundaries.
